## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX AI's rapid growth, upcoming equity distribution, and Carta's services for cap table management and 409A valuation.](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX AI has grown to $4.2M ARR in \~7 months, now transitioning from LLC to C-Corp](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [Urgent need for 409A valuation, equity distribution, and potential SAFE round](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Carta can provide rapid 409A (2-3 days), cap table management, and compensation benchmarking](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Agreed on Grow plan + QSBS + Total Comp tool for $61,120/yr (pre-discount), billed quarterly](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX AI's Rapid Growth

  - [Started as workshops, pivoted to end-to-end AI-powered content/strategy service](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [Now at $4.2M ARR, 70%+ margins, profitable](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [Transitioning from LLC to C-Corp for fundraising/equity distribution](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Targeting $14-16M ARR, \~100 clients, 60-80 employees by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Inbound investor interest (Battery, Iconic, Madrona)](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)

### Carta Services & Pricing

  - [409A valuation can be completed in 2-3 business days](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Grow plan ($3,120/yr) + QSBS service + Total Comp benchmarking tool](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [Total package: $61,120/yr before 20% partner discount](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [Quarterly billing option selected](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [Includes cap table management, SAFE handling, investor management](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)

### Equity & Compensation Strategy

  - [No equity issued yet, planning distribution soon](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [Hiring internationally, selective talent acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Total Comp tool provides benchmarking data for various roles/locations](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [QSBS service ensures compliance and provides stakeholder letters](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Fundraising & Growth Plans

  - [Considering SAFE round for early employees/contributors](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Preparing for potential Series A in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Primary use of funds: hiring top engineers, building ahead of demand](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Currently turning down business due to capacity constraints](https://fathom.video/share/fGsW5efHcFiifUqNyzjuW2FEey8RRgyE?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
